articles.title: “I was a stalker fan”: Shahana Goswami on dating Milind Soman despite 21-year age gap and moving on quickly after breakup
articles.description: Actress Shahana Goswami candidly shared details about her past relationship with Milind Soman. She revealed their unexpected connection began with her being a teenage fan, leading to a six-year texting exchange before they dated. Despite their love and a 21-year age gap, they parted ways in 2013 due to differing life aspirations and a desire for freedom. She added that she found clarity soon after the breakup, and formula of relationships doesnt suit her.

articles.title: Actor and YouTube star Satyendra passes away due to health issues
articles.description: Actor and popular YouTube film reviewer Satyendra has passed away due to health complications at Chennai's Royapettah Government Hospital. Known for his distinctive commentary on films, including his final review of 'Karuppu', Satyendra had a notable presence in both cinema and the digital space. His demise has deeply saddened fans and industry colleagues.

articles.title: AMMA row: Ansiba Hassan seeks independent committee

Hassan, who previously resigned as joint secretary citing issues with Tiny Tom, demands an impartial committee and transparency for her allegations. The association aims for an internal resolution before its June 21 general body meeting.

The incident is reportedly being investigated as a potential hate crime.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Alan Watts: 'A person who thinks all the time has nothing to think about except thoughts. So, he loses touch with reality...' - How constant overthinking can quietly disconnect people from real life explained by the British-American writer
articles.description: Modern life keeps people constantly occupied with thoughts, worries, notifications, and endless mental noise, which is why Alan Watts’s quote of the day about overthinking still resonates. His idea suggests that when people become trapped inside continuous thinking, they slowly lose touch with real experiences, emotions, relationships, and the present moment itself.

articles.title: Gracie Abrams announces massive ‘The Look At My Life’ tour: Check full schedule and ticket details
articles.description: Gracie Abrams has announced her expansive “The Look At My Life” Tour, a 64-date global arena run scheduled from December 2026 through May 2027. The tour will take the singer-songwriter across North America, Europe, the United Kingdom, and Ireland, including multiple-night performances in cities such as Los Angeles, Brooklyn, London, Paris, and Berlin. The concerts arrive in support of her upcoming third studio album, “Daughter From Hell,” releasing on July 17.

articles.title: Mega Power Star Ram Charan revisits his conversation with Honorable Prime Minister Modi ji about how Peddi is rooted in empowering rural India
articles.description: Mega Power Star Ram Charan has left fans excited for his upcoming sports drama Peddi. Ever since the trailer dropped, audiences have been praising the hard work and transformation he has brought to the role. While Peddi showcases Ram Charan as a sportsman involved in multiple sports, the film also highlights the spirit and strength of rural India. Speaking at a recent event about how South films are becoming more rooted and culture-driven, Ram Charan shared , “The films we are making in the South today are deeply rooted to our culture and soil. They are not city-based, but set in villages and towns. Our archery team in India has many tribal players because they naturally possess that talent. It’s beautiful when such talent from villages gets recognised.” Ram Charan also recalled his conversation with Modi ji about Peddi. “The last time I met our Honorable Prime Minister Modi ji in Delhi, he asked me what Peddi was about. I told him it’s about an evolved India and empowering our villages. Modi ji then shared a story from West Bengal, where decades ago a footballer from a small village represented India, and today over 85 people from that same village play football,” he said. Peddi stars Janhvi Kapoor, Divyenndu and Boman Irani in pivotal roles. Directed by Buchi Babu Sana, the film releases on 4th June.
articles.source: Latest Movie Updates, Film News, Movie Reviews,pre

articles.title: Hrithik Roshan To Enter Jailer 2 After Shah Rukh Khan Exit Buzz?
articles.description: Fresh buzz around Jailer 2 has sent the internet into full frenzy mode after reports claimed Hrithik Roshan is being considered for a special cameo in the film. Earlier speculation suggested that Shah Rukh Khan was approached for the role, but reports now say scheduling conflicts may have prevented that collaboration from happening. While there is still no official confirmation from the makers, social media has already started imagining a massive pan-India crossover between Rajinikanth and Hrithik Roshan. Fans are calling it potential “opening-day chaos” energy, with many convinced the sequel is aiming for blockbuster event-cinema scale. Even before confirmation, the rumor itself has become one of the biggest entertainment talking points online.
